# Thryv — Small Business Accountants in Cape Town & Stellenbosch

> Thryv (Thryv Accountants Pty Ltd) is a chartered accounting firm in Cape Town and Stellenbosch, South Africa. We give small and medium businesses a complete, outsourced finance function — bookkeeping, accounting, tax, payroll, audit, financial statements and advisory — for one predictable fixed monthly fee. Our model removes the admin and compliance workload so owners can focus on growing their business.

## What makes Thryv different
- Fixed monthly fee — no hourly billing and no surprise invoices.
- Chartered accountants (CA) handling SARS and CIPC compliance end to end.
- Cloud accounting included, with real-time dashboards and management reporting.
- A genuine business partner, not just a once-a-year accountant.
- Serves SME owners across Cape Town, Stellenbosch and the rest of South Africa.

## Services
- Accounting Services — fixed-fee monthly accounting for small businesses: /services/accounting-services/
- Bookkeeping — outsourced, cloud bookkeeping that keeps your books current: /services/bookkeeping-services/
- Tax Services — income tax, provisional tax and VAT by registered tax practitioners: /services/tax-services/
- Payroll — outsourced payroll with PAYE, UIF, SDL and Department of Labour submissions: /services/payroll-services/
- Audit Services — statutory and voluntary audits under the Companies Act: /services/audit-services/
- Independent Review — a cost-effective audit alternative for qualifying companies: /services/independent-review/
- Financial Statements — IFRS for SMEs annual financial statements: /services/financial-statement-preparation/
- Company Secretary — CIPC annual returns, beneficial ownership and statutory registers: /services/company-secretary/
- Finance Consultancy — cash-flow forecasting, management accounts and outsourced CFO support: /services/finance-consultancy-services/
- Employer of Record — hire and pay staff in South Africa without a local entity: /services/employer-of-record/

## Who we help
Small and medium business owners, startups, entrepreneurs and foreign companies expanding into South Africa, across industries including hospitality, healthcare, property/real estate, security and professional services.
